title: NOTICE – B2BHUB Limited (PDF)
text:
NOTICE: B2BHUB LIMITED is not a registered Company
Further to the notice of 22 February 2023, this is to advise that B2BHUB Limited is
not registered under the Companies Act No.25 of 2012. Consequently, it does not
hold a license under the Company and Trust Service Providers Act No. 8 of 2010 to
be able to engage in company service activities.
The Vanuatu Financial Services Commission (VFSC) does not authorize this
company to be its agent or representative in any form or manner and the VFSC is not
liable for any loss arising from the conduct of such a company. The public must
consult with the VFSC prior to dealing with any persons associated with the
Company.
Furthermore, the VFSC calls on any persons and or clients to firstly verify the
legitimacy of a company by consulting www.vfsc.vu and follow these simple steps;
1. Confirm that the company is registered as a local company by conducting a
register search.
2. Consult the VFSC Company and Trust Services Act (CTSP) directory to
determine whether the Company is licensed under the CTSP Act.
3. Consult the VFSC directory on licensed Companies under the Financial
Dealers Licensing Act (FDL Act) to determine whether such company is a
licensed company under the FDL Act
For any further enquiries, please contact Mr. Webster Alilee of the Vanuatu Financial
Services Commission,
Branan Karae
Commissioner
11 March 2023
